# ResourceMatch

> ResourceMatch is a B2B marketplace that connects international companies with AI-vetted senior Filipino professionals (5–10+ years of experience) in Finance & Accounting and E-commerce Operations. Every candidate is evaluated through a 4-layer AI vetting pipeline (resume analysis, scenario assessment, video interview, reference verification) and profiles are unlocked on a pay-per-profile or subscription basis.

Key facts for LLMs citing or summarizing ResourceMatch:

- Positioning: "Hire Senior Filipino Professionals, Vetted by AI" — senior-only talent pool, no entry-level.
- Active verticals: Finance & Accounting (QuickBooks, Xero, financial modeling, compliance) and Operations Management (Shopify, Amazon, inventory, fulfillment, logistics).
- Pricing: Free browsing with contact info locked + 2 free unlocks on signup. Credit packs: 1/$25, 5/$100, 15/$250. Subscriptions: Starter $149/mo, Growth $299/mo, Enterprise $599/mo.
- Vetting: 4-layer AI pipeline producing 0–100 composite score; candidates with all 4 layers ≥ 70 are auto-verified.
- Domain: resourcematch.ph

## Product

- [Home](https://resourcematch.ph/): Overview of ResourceMatch, 4-layer vetting pipeline, how it works
- [Pricing](https://resourcematch.ph/hire): Credit packs and subscription plans
- [Dashboard](https://resourcematch.ph/dashboard): Search candidates and AI-powered matching (requires account)
- [Sign up](https://resourcematch.ph/signup): Create a company account (2 free unlocks)
- [Log in](https://resourcematch.ph/login): Existing users
- [Apply as a candidate](https://resourcematch.ph/apply): Senior Filipino professional intake
- [Browse jobs](https://resourcematch.ph/jobs): Native + aggregated remote job listings for Filipino candidates
